description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsPurple corduroy bag with one main zippered compartmentTop stitch and bead detailing in front Synthetic lining with zippered pocketsOne zippered pocket and branding at backTwo short handles for carrying easeMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 30 cmWidth: 35 cm
